results.name: Wheat Leaf Rust (Puccinia triticina)
results.description: Orange-brown pustules on leaves; reduces photosynthetic area under humid conditions.
results.treatment: Triazole or strobilurin fungicides at first detection; resistant cultivars next season; avoid excess N.
results.image_symptoms: Orange pustules on wheat leaf blades with slight chlorotic halos.

results.name: Rice Blast (Magnaporthe oryzae)
results.description: Spindle-shaped lesions on leaves; neck blast can cause blank grains.
results.treatment: Fungicides at booting; balanced split N; resistant varieties; avoid prolonged wet canopy.
results.image_symptoms: Gray-brown spindle spots with darker borders on rice foliage.

results.name: Tomato Early Blight (Alternaria solani)
results.description: Concentric ring lesions on older leaves; can affect stems and fruit in wet weather.
results.treatment: Remove infected leaves; airflow; rotate; mancozeb/chlorothalonil or azoxystrobin programs.
results.image_symptoms: Dark target-like spots on lower tomato leaves with yellowing.

results.name: Potato Late Blight (Phytophthora infestans)
results.description: Water-soaked patches turning brown-black; sporulation on leaf undersides in cool humid nights.
results.treatment: Protectant fungicides before favorable weather; certified seed; destroy culls.
results.image_symptoms: Greasy dark lesions with fuzzy sporulation along margins in morning humidity.

results.name: Cotton Bacterial Blight (Xanthomonas citri pv. malvacearum)
results.description: Angular water-soaked spots, vein blackening; spreads with rain splash.
results.treatment: Certified acid-delinted seed; rotation; copper sprays early; avoid overhead irrigation.
results.image_symptoms: Dark angular leaf spots bounded by veins on young cotton.

results.name: Sugarcane Red Rot
results.description: Internal stalk reddening with odor; wilting of clump in advanced stages.
results.treatment: Healthy setts; rogue infected stools; drainage; resistant varieties.
results.image_symptoms: Reddened vascular strands in sugarcane cross-section.

results.name: Mango Anthracnose (Colletotrichum spp.)
results.description: Dark lesions on leaves, flowers, young fruit; blossom blight in wet weather.
results.treatment: Copper pre-flowering; prune for aeration; fungicides per local advisory.
results.image_symptoms: Blackish spots on mango leaves and inflorescence speckling.

results.name: Turmeric Rhizome Rot
results.description: Yellowing, wilting; soft brown rhizome decay worsened by waterlogging.
results.treatment: Drainage, raised beds; Trichoderma + fungicide on seed rhizomes; rotation.
results.image_symptoms: Water-soaked brown rhizome scales; reduced fibrous roots.
